_comment: Canonical-winner ledger. Maps a mislabel/shorthand family KEY to its canonical family VALUE, applied AFTER M4 family normalisation and BEFORE bare-gen-split in BOTH parse entrypoints (ParseFamilyDetailed and InferFamilyFromIDWithVariant). The VALUE (canonical target) is validated against allFamilies at load (fail-fast via FamilyAliasesJSONError). Keys are mislabels and need NOT be canonical families. DEFAULT is own-family: genuinely distinct families (mixtral, ministral, qwq, aion, pixtral, voxtral, codellama, magnum, etc.) need NO row — ID-driven decomposition already keeps them self-consistent. Only add a row to remap a leading token to a DIFFERENT canonical family, and ONLY with user sign-off for any fold-into-parent. Sorted alphabetically by key.
